puzzle.hint: A reminder of Allah's provision in this world and our ultimate return to Him.
puzzle.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًۭا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
puzzle.verseEn: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.
